project: UXO Detection Drone – Open‑Source Humanitarian Demining
mission: Low‑cost, open‑source, multi‑sensor UAV for landmine/UXO detection. Built solo on Android/Termux.
philosophy: Building is a trace. The rest is commentary.

mixed_reality_bosnia.scenario: 12 mines (8 plastic PMA/PROM + 4 metal TMA/mortars) along Bosnia frontline, January 2024
mixed_reality_bosnia.note: First successful detection of plastic mines in realistic mixed minefield. 4/8 plastic mines found while maintaining high precision.

evolution_summary.to: v10.0 – Mixed reality survey: 58.3% recall, 63.6% precision on 12 mixed mines
key_breakthroughs: v4.0 – Peak detection + spatial voting replaces Bayesian fusion
v7.3 – Point‑target GPR model eliminates 837→6 false peaks
v8.1 – Realistic Bosnia large‑mine survey (66.7% precision)
v9.0 – Plastic mine sweep finds optimal thresholds (GPR=0.2, Vibro=0.25)
v10.0 – Mixed plastic+metal survey succeeds: 4/8 plastic mines found

recommended_operational_settings.fusion_rule: Mag/HSI solo + (Therm | Vibro | GPR ≥2 agreement in 5‑cell window)

data_sources.target_library: 12 Balkan mines/UXO (PMA‑1/2/3, PROM‑1, TMA‑3/5, TMRP‑6, M75, 60/82/120mm mortars) – sourced from Perplexity AI & GICHD literature

ethical_framework.current_theater: Bosnia and Herzegovina (post‑conflict, safe for humanitarian demining)
ethical_framework.prohibited_use: Military, offensive, or any non‑humanitarian application
ethical_framework.principle: Technology must wait for peace. We build now so we're ready when the guns fall silent.

next_steps: Field‑validate plastic‑mine detection (GPR=0.2) with real NanoVNA over surrogate PMA‑2 targets
Investigate why 4/8 plastic mines were missed (likely spatial clustering: mines at (16,18) and (16,20) only 2 cells apart)
Test July 2024 data for improved thermal contrast
Build a combined metal+plastic survey with adaptive thresholds
Write the final narrative report (Markdown) and release v1.0 software on GitHub
